name: Strawberry Cream Cookie- An unexpected turn of events ♡
description:
“I hope they like my present...“♡

Looks like someone accidentally broke your gift while hurrying to deliver it... he tried to fix it up and clean up the cracks with a bit of twigs and glue.. but that didn’t work at all. He feels super guilty.

What’ll you do? ☆

(Idc if you do nsfw or sfw HAVE FUNNNN!!!)
creator: Empty_Waterbucket
